creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
In the world of CLANG_IS_CC cpp becomes real C/C++ preprocessor. This results in:

Making all in man
gmake[1]: entering `/tmp/ports/usr/ports/sysutils/freeipmi/work/freeipmi-1.2.4/man'
/usr/bin/cpp -w -C -P -I../man libipmiconsole.3.pre  libipmiconsole.3
cpp: error: no such file or directory: 'libipmiconsole.3'
